description:
To specify a remote NTP server for time synchronization, edit the file /etc/ntp.conf. Add or correct the following lines, substituting the IP or hostname of a remote NTP server for ntpserver: 
server ntpserver
This instructs the NTP software to contact that remote server to obtain time data.
rationale:
Synchronizing with an NTP server makes it possible
to collate system logs from multiple sources or correlate computer events with
real time events.
ocil:
To verify that a remote NTP service is configured for time synchronization, open the following file: 
/etc/ntp.conf
In the file, there should be a section similar to the following: 
server ntpserver
title: Specify a Remote NTP Server
